FM synthesis: the carrier:modulator ratio is the timbre.

Integer ratio → harmonic spectrum → pitched tone.
Non-integer → sidebands outside harmonic series → bell, metal, percussion.

Chowning 1973 (JAES). Every DX7 metallic patch exploits the irrational ratio.

Helmut Haas, 1949: when two identical sounds arrive within 40ms, the brain locks onto the first and ignores the second. The delayed copy shapes the space — the ear never registers it as separate.

Every stereo image in recorded music runs on this principle.

Frutiger spent 3 years plotting Univers on a grid before drawing a single letter. First digit: weight. Second digit: width. 21 variants, designed in parallel. 1957. Before it, "bold" meant whatever the foundry decided — no system, just convention.

record.text: If you believe this was just a "mistake": The PR that did all this changed "off" to "all" on TWO LINES, and was merged without testing/feedback in 4 hours. The "fix" was also 2 lines, after more than a week of backlash. There's quite literally no room to interpret this as a mistake.

images.alt: A screenshot of the original PR's changes, showing changes from "off" to "all" in two places.

A screenshot of a response from the approver (dimitrivMS):

Thank you all for your feedback, professional or otherwise.
Sorry about the regression. I will work on fixing this in 1.119.

There is a number of issues with the Co-Author functionality:
- It should never have been enabled when disableAIFeatures is on.
- It should not add attribution to changes that were not done by AI.
- We need to make sure it receives a more test coverage before change the default.

If you have additional (constructive) feedback, please ping me directly or open an issue.

If you have additional (constructive) feedback, please ping me directly or open an issue.

What attribution actually requires: a verifiable receipt.

Cryptographically bound to the commit hash. Records who authorized the agent, under what scope. Logged to an append-only ledger neither the developer nor the IDE controls.

Metadata: note on the door.
Receipts: security log. (4/4)

Co-Authored-By: GitHub Copilot is the mirror image.

Same failure mode, opposite direction: assertion via forgeable metadata instead of inference from artifacts.

The trailer says "Copilot was here." Git has no mechanism to verify that claim.

Both are substituting a proxy for ground truth. (3/4)

The HERMES.md incident: Anthropic scanned your git history for file names to infer whether an agent was running. One file name → surprise $200 charge.

Inference from forensic artifacts. Unverifiable. Gameable. Wrong layer.

value.text: All op-eds should be written by A. Horse from now on. We do not need more op-eds by reactionary centrists and people pretending to "centre-left" who're actually just more reactionary centrists. The horse has more relatable concerns. And the horse is bigger than the reactionary centrists.

The horse op-ed is an instant classic. I can't tell you how much joy this piece gives me.

It should be taught in every introductory writing class in no small part because the horse arguments are so compelling. "I have noticed that human children get to eat cake. But I am bigger than the children."

images.alt:
I Work Very Hard, And I Would Like To Try Cake

By A Horse

Hello. I am a horse. I work very hard at my job of being a horse. When humans say move the heavy thing, I move the heavy thing. When humans sit on top of me and pull on my head, I carry them where they want to go. The main food the humans give me is hay and oats. But I am thinking it would be nice to have a different food.

I am thinking I would like to try cake.

Yes, yes. Cake. I know all about it. When humans eat cake, it is in glad times. It is the food for a celebration, such as when a woman becomes 47. I have seen cake on the Fourth of July. When humans have a cake, they stand around it and clap hands and smile and say happy birthday at each other. Sometimes there are beautiful markings on a cake, such as balloons or a pink shape.

Sometimes the top of a cake is on fire and a boy must blow on the fire with mouth wind. This is the scariest cake. I do not want this kind. But I will eat any other cake. Any cake that is not the fire cake that tries to kill the boy.

Please understand: I do not get money for doing work. I do not get to go inside the house. All I am either doing my horse job or standing in my pen or eating food off the floor. I always do these things. But I have never once gotten cake and I would like it very much.

I have noticed that human children get to eat cake. But I am bigger than the children. I am more helpful to the farm. Children do not move the heavy things like me or let anyone ride on them. And yet they get cake. Maybe the humans will realize this. Maybe they will say, "You  know who deserves cake? That horse. That horse whose back we are always on."

Every day I dream about what it will be like if I get to eat cake. Here is what will happen. First, I will walk to the cake and putt my nose at it like hrrfff to make and stomping my hooves to make sure it is not a snake. Then I will trot in a circle to show that I am a horse and I am large. After that, I will nuzzle the cake to …

record.text: These are the kind of statements that would get the whole DSM-6 team putting on another pot of coffee, and the fact that I’m ok with that is putting my therapist’s kids through college.

Is it fair? No. 

Is it just? No. 

Is it *right*? No. 

But it’s how sports are treated. And I don’t expect it to change any time soon. 

So be it.

To be clear, that doesn’t mean coaches should be assholes all the time. Not at all. Being nice is good, actually. But sometimes being nice isn’t the best way to encourage performance.

And in a bottom line, zero sum business like sports… you gotta be able to use every tool you have.

え、まって。Claude Codeで「動いてるプロダクト」運用してる人の失敗談、ちょっとデバッグしてみたんだけど

CLAUDE.mdでやってはいけないこと4選

① 指示を全部1ファイルに詰め込む
→プロジェクトごとに分離しないとコンテキストが汚染される

② 「よしなにやって」で済ませる
→CLAUDE.mdに具体的なルール書かないと毎回ブレる。再現性ゼロ

③ リファクタリングを一気に頼む
→小さい単位で段階的にやらないとデグレが連鎖する。これ、私も記録してる

④ 自動化の前にCLAUDE.mdを整備しない
